summary: A decent PZM audience capture with extra energy, though the performance itself isn’t a standout show.
review: The reviewer notes that this recording delivers more energy than a pristine DAT version and praises the quality of the PZM (pressure‑zone microphone) capture. However, they also point out that the concert isn’t among the band’s best performances, making it an okay but not essential listen.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 3‑star review; the show is described as below average while the recording is called very fine, leading to an overall mid‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: PZM (pressure‑zone microphone) capture noted as clear and energetic; no specific issues mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer says the show isn’t the best, but provides more energy than other recordings; no detailed set commentary.
